title: Inventory the remaining gap to complete self-hosting
goal: Create a precise, repository-verified gap list for complete self-hosting so later Ralph iterations do not chase vague goals.
context: Read SELFHOST_WORK.md, ROADMAP.md, docs/SELFHOST.md, selfhost/README.md, and all selfhost/*.tya files.
Inspect scripts/selfhost_bootstrap_check.sh and the tests under tests/ that exercise self-hosting.
Treat perfect self-hosting as: selfhost tools compile themselves through repeated stages, generated tools run the supported examples, and generated C reaches a stable fixed point.
steps: Run the current focused self-host checks to identify the true baseline.
List unsupported language features by comparing README implemented features against docs/SELFHOST.md and selfhost parser/checker/codegen support.
Update SELFHOST_WORK.md with an explicit remaining-gap checklist ordered by dependency.
Update ROADMAP.md and docs/SELFHOST.md only where the current status is stale.
Do not implement feature support in this task unless needed to make the inventory accurate.
done_when: SELFHOST_WORK.md contains a concrete remaining-gap queue for complete self-hosting.
The docs distinguish current bootstrap success from remaining full-language parity work.
.agent/tasks.json marks SELFHOST-001 as passing and the change is committed.
